response.overview: Akhil is called Akhil Bakhil because of his stingy nature like Haji Bakhil. One day, when Akhil experienced a headache and visited Dr. Amira's clinic, he was diagnosed with brain cancer and is expected not to live long. Akhil regrets his behavior all this time and apologizes to all his acquaintances. To make matters worse, his fiancée, Nina, decides to break off their engagement.
response.title: Akhil Yang Bakhil
